default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: Hehe, it's been a while! Did you miss me? Were you secretly crying yourself to sleep? Well, dry those tears, 'cause I'm back!

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: The restless souls... they seem to have calmed down.

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: I will not fail those who lifted me up from the abyss. I will inherit their will and continue on this path with unwavering determination!

default.title: Level Start
default.text: Stay behind me. This time, I'll protect you.

default.title: Victory
default.text: This kind of stuff is nothing to me now. Piece of cake!

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: One more try, this time I'll definitely beat them to a pulp!

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: Whack them all!

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: I must... protect everyone...

default.title: Greeting
default.text: I hear their whispers in the dark... They linger around me, saying... "Dear Chief, when will Hella get her allowance?"

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: I wrote you all tons of letters and brought back loads of gifts during my trip, but unfortunately they're all gone now... Uh, IOUs? What IOUs? I have no idea what you're talking about, ahahaha...

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: I might have lost my favorite pipe, but now I've got some fancy new gear. Hits fast and reaches far, though it's a little bit tricky to control. So now you can't make fun of my T-rex arms anymore!

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: These? Oh, they don't hurt at all. I'm used to them by now. Besides, don't people always say, "Scars are badges of courage" or something? Well, I've got my own collection of badges now.

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: While fighting that damn Black Ring, I had so many dreams. You were there, along with Hecate, Ninety-Nine, and many others. You all told me not to be afraid, not to give up... You said you'd always be waiting for me to come back...

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: I met a lot of amazing people out there. They're so strong—they never back down from even the hardest challenges, and even when they're hurting, they wipe away their tears and face their problems head-on! That's what real strength is... I need to keep pushing myself harder too.

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: To be honest, I still don't like fighting. I don't enjoy combat or pain, but I hate standing by helplessly while everyone I care about gets hurt even more. I'm stronger now, and this time, it's my turn to stand in front and protect you!

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: Money and friends—looks like all my original wishes have come true. But I've still got a spark of greediness inside me. I want to adventure, I want to meet more friends, and I want to become stronger and more awesome, so I can protect all of you in the future! Of course, achieving all this will be tough, but I'm not afraid, because... I know you'll always be by my side.

default.title: Idle
default.text: Just as I thought, I get sleepy as soon as I'm back... No, this won't do! Quick, get everyone here. I haven't told you all about my legendary adventures yet!

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: Seriously? It's been so long, and you still haven't kicked that annoying habit of yours?

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: Alright, I know you've missed me terribly. Here, it's on the house this time—take a good, long look to your heart's content.

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: Please, pretty please! Let me show you all my new tricks!

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: Picture perfect! Well? Wasn't that way better than before?

default.title: Level Up
default.text: Aren't you way too nice to me?

default.title: Pat Head
default.text: Those folks at the lab say it's some kind of contaminated crystal. Can't get rid of it, but at least it doesn't feel bad when you touch it—ouch! Nicked my finger.
